fa-shrimp.appearanceId: curved shrimp with segmented body, tail fan, and antennae
fa-shrimp.intentId: select a shrimp or shellfish item

fa-sign-posts-wrench.appearanceId: two directional signpost arrows on a pole with a wrench overlaid
fa-sign-posts-wrench.functionalityId: configure or repair routing or directions

fa-signal-1.appearanceId: five signal bars with one bar filled
fa-signal-1.intentId: show network or connectivity is nearly absent

fa-signal-2.appearanceId: five signal bars with two bars filled
fa-signal-2.intentId: show network or connectivity is poor

fa-signal-3.appearanceId: five signal bars with three bars filled
fa-signal-3.intentId: show network or connectivity is fair

fa-signal-4.appearanceId: five signal bars with four bars filled
fa-signal-4.intentId: show network or connectivity is good

fa-signal-alt-1.appearanceId: four signal bars with one bar filled
fa-signal-alt-1.intentId: show minimal connectivity on alternate meter

fa-signal-alt-2.appearanceId: four signal bars with two bars filled
fa-signal-alt-2.intentId: show low connectivity on alternate meter

fa-signal-alt-3.appearanceId: four signal bars with three bars filled
fa-signal-alt-3.intentId: show fair connectivity on alternate meter

fa-sitemap.functionalityId: view or manage site or org structure
fa-sitemap.intentId: navigate or plan a hierarchical layout

fa-sliders.appearanceId: three horizontal lines with offset adjustment handles

fa-spider.appearanceId: spider body with eight legs spread out
